message: Add skip_publish option to release workflows

files.patch:
@@ -17,6 +17,11 @@ on:
           User-facing release title (auto-generated if omitted)
         required: false
         type: string
+      skip_publish:
+        description: Skip publish/tag/branch updates (dry run)
+        required: false
+        type: boolean
+        default: false
 
 jobs:
   release:
@@ -25,4 +30,5 @@ jobs:
       bump: major
       intro: ${{ inputs.intro }}
       title: ${{ inputs.title }}
+      skip_publish: ${{ inputs.skip_publish }}
     secrets: inherit

@@ -24,6 +24,11 @@ on:
           User-facing release title (auto-generated if omitted)
         required: false
         type: string
+      skip_publish:
+        description: Skip publish/tag/branch updates (dry run)
+        required: false
+        type: boolean
+        default: false
   workflow_call:
     inputs:
       bump:
@@ -39,6 +44,11 @@ on:
         required: false
         default: ""
         type: string
+      skip_publish:
+        description: Skip publish/tag/branch updates (dry run)
+        required: false
+        default: false
+        type: boolean
 
 jobs:
   release:
@@ -73,13 +83,15 @@ jobs:
 
         echo "Updated version.json with tenzir-version: ${VERSION_NUMBER}"
         echo "Updated Python package versions to: ${VERSION_NUMBER}"
+      skip-publish: ${{ inputs.skip_publish }}
       publish-no-latest-on-non-main: true
       copy-release-to-main-on-non-main: true
       update-latest-branch-on-main: true
     secrets: inherit
 
   sbom:
     name: Attach SBOM
+    if: ${{ !inputs.skip_publish }}
     needs: release
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     permissions:
